findings: Smoke test only covers happy-path: 1 agent claims 1 task, completes successfully
No agent failure scenario tested; stub agent always succeeds
Stuck-detection NOT tested despite logic in stampede-monitor.sh:200-213
Dead agent recovery and orphan recovery have zero test coverage
Recovery/restart behavior (SKILL.md crash recovery) is not tested
Partial failure scenarios not tested; smoke test uses exactly 1 agent/1 task
Metaswarm smoke test also only covers success path
